pages.text: These creatures, resembling a fusion between Creepers and Spiders, serve as exceptional servants. Their explosions are swift, capable of igniting and weakening your foes. You can summon a loyal Spider Creeder Servant through an Adept Nether Ritual.
The untamed power of the Nether has taught you how to push the art of explosion to its very limits.
Spider Creeder Servants will fight for you with fervent explosions.
